avengers-endgame.title: Avengers: Endgame
avengers-endgame.description: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more in order to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance to the universe.

avengers-infinity-war.title: Avengers: Endgame
avengers-infinity-war.description: The Avengers and their allies must be willing to sacrifice all in an attempt to defeat the powerful Thanos before his blitz of devastation and ruin puts an end to the universe.

baahubali-2-the-conclusion.title: Avengers: Endgame
baahubali-2-the-conclusion.description: This film is the follow-up to Baahubali: The Beginning, serving as both a sequel and a prequel. The film is set in medieval India and follows the sibling rivalry between Amarendra Baahubali and Bhallaladeva; the latter conspires against the former and has him killed by Kattappa.

brahmastra-part-one-shiva.title: Brahmastra-part-one-shiva
brahmastra-part-one-shiva.description: Mukerji stated that the core idea was inspired by stories of Hindu mythology he heard in his childhood from his grandfather. Kapoor described the film as an action-adventure about a DJ named Shiva and his journey with his ladylove Isha, and finally something that leads him to his destiny which is the Brahmastra.

deadpool-and-wolverine.title: Deadpool-and-wolverine
deadpool-and-wolverine.description: Wolverine is recovering from his injuries when he crosses paths with the loudmouth, Deadpool. They team up to defeat a common enemy.

dune-part-two.title: Dune-Part-Two
dune-part-two.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family.

extraction-2.title: Extraction
extraction-2.description: A hardened gun-for-hire's latest mission becomes a soul-searching race to survive when he's sent into Bangladesh to rescue a drug lord's kidnapped son. Watch all you want. Chris Hemsworth stars in this nonstop action-thriller with Rudhraksh Jaiswal, Randeep Hooda and Golshifteh Farahani.

fifty-shades-of-gray.title: Fifty-Shades-Of-GFiftyray
fifty-shades-of-gray.description: Fifty Shades of Grey is a 2011 erotic romance novel by British author E. L. James. It became the first installment in the Fifty Shades novel series that follows the deepening relationship between a college graduate, Anastasia Steele, and a young business magnate, Christian Grey.

furiosa-a-mad-max-saga.title: Furiosa-a-mad-max-saga
furiosa-a-mad-max-saga.description: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga premiered at the 77th Cannes Film Festival on 15 May 2024. It was released in theatres in Australia by Warner Bros. on 23 May 2024, and in the United States the following day. The film received positive reviews from critics and grossed $116 million against its $168 million budget.

gangs-of-wasseypur.title: Gangs-of-Wasseypur
gangs-of-wasseypur.description: Gangs of Wasseypur is a 2012 Indian Hindi-language two-part epic black comedy crime film produced and directed by Anurag Kashyap, and written by Kashyap and Zeishan Quadri.

godzilla-x-kong-the-new-empire.title: Godzilla-x-Kong-the-New-Empire
godzilla-x-kong-the-new-empire.description: The new installment in the Monsterverse puts the mighty Kong and the fearsome Godzilla against a colossal deadly threat hidden within our world that threatens the existence of their species and our very own, as well as diving deep into the mysteries of Skull Island and beyond.

hanu-man.title: Hanu-Man
hanu-man.description: Hanu-Man (also marketed as HanuMan) is a 2024 Indian Telugu-language superhero film written and directed by Prasanth Varma and produced by Primeshow Entertainment. It stars Teja Sajja in the title role, alongside Amritha Aiyer, Varalaxmi Sarathkumar, Samuthirakani, Vinay Rai, Vennela Kishore and Raj Deepak Shetty.

kantara.title: Kantara
kantara.description: Mystical Forest: is a 2022 Indian Kannada-language action thriller film written and directed by Rishab Shetty, and produced by Vijay Kiragandur, under Hombale Films. The film stars Rishab Shetty in a dual role with Kambala champion who is at loggerheads with an upright forest officer, Murali (played by Kishore).

kingdom-of-the-planet-of-the-apes.title: Kingdom-of-the-Planet-of-the-Apes
kingdom-of-the-planet-of-the-apes.description: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes is a 2024 American science fiction action film directed by Wes Ball and written by Josh Friedman. A standalone sequel to War for the Planet of the Apes (2017), it is the fourth installment in the Planet of the Apes reboot franchise and the tenth film overall.

kung-fu-panda-4.title: Kung-Fu-Panda-4
kung-fu-panda-4.description: About. This spring, for the first time in almost a decade, comedy icon Jack Black returns to his role as Po, the world's most unlikely kung fu master, with a hilarious, butt-kicking new chapter in DreamWorks Animation's beloved action-comedy franchise: Kung Fu Panda 4.

madame-web.title: Madame-Web
madame-web.description: Madame Web (Cassandra Webb) is a character appearing in American comic books published by Marvel Comics. She first appeared in The Amazing Spider-Man No. 210, published November 1980, and was created by writer Denny O'Neil and artist John Romita Jr.

pushpa-2.title: Pushpa-2: The Rule
pushpa-2.description: It is the second installment in the Pushpa film series and the sequel to Pushpa: The Rise. 10% of the film's footage was initially shot back-to-back with the original film. However, Sukumar decided to alter the story, which led to the film's principal photography commencing in October 2022.

rrr.title: RRR
rrr.description: RRR is an entirely fictitious story incorporating the lives of two real-life Indian revolutionaries, namely Alluri Sitarama Raju and Komaram Bheem, who fought against the British Raj and the Nizam of Hyderabad respectively. Charan plays Rama Raju while Rama Rao plays Komaram Bheem.

salaar-part-1-ceasefire.title: Salaar-Part-1-Ceasefire
salaar-part-1-ceasefire.description: A gang leader tries to keep a promise made to his dying friend and takes on the other criminal gangs.

shogun.title: Shogun
shogun.description: Shogun is the best no-code visual page builder to pair with native platforms. Achieve your vision fast with generative AI, multi-store content management, and optimization features.

spiderman-no-way-home.title: Spiderman-No-Way-Home
spiderman-no-way-home.description: For the first time in the cinematic history of Spider-Man, our friendly neighborhood hero's identity is revealed, bringing his Super Hero responsibilities into conflict with his normal life and putting those he cares about most at risk.

the-goat-life.title: The-Goat-Life
the-goat-life.description: It is an adaptation of the 2008 best-selling Malayalam novel Aadujeevitham by Benyamin, which is based on the real-life story of Najeeb, a Malayali immigrant laborer, one among thousands of Indians who were forced into slavery in Saudi Arabia as goatherds on secluded farms in the deserts by the native Arabs.

the-godfather.title: The-Godfather
the-godfather.description: The Godfather is set in the 1940s and takes place entirely within the world of the Corleones, a fictional New York Mafia family. It opens inside the dark office of the family patriarch, Don Vito Corleone (also known as the Godfather and played by Brando), on the wedding day of his daughter, Connie (Talia Shire).

the-shawshank-redemption.title: The-Shawshank-Redemption
the-shawshank-redemption.description: In 1947, Andy Dufresne is convicted of murdering his wife and her lover and is sentenced to two consecutive life terms in prison. Andy is transferred to the Shawshank State Penitentiary, where he is introduced to Samuel L. Norton, warden of the prison, alongside with Byron Hadley, chief captain of the guards.

tillu-square.title: Tillu-Square
tillu-square.description: Tillu Square (stylised as (TILLU)²) is a 2024 Indian Telugu-language romantic crime comedy film directed by Mallik Ram and produced by Suryadevara Naga Vamsi under the banner of Sithara Entertainments and Fortune Four Cinemas. A sequel to the 2022 film DJ Tillu, Siddhu Jonnalagadda reprises his role from the previous film, while Anupama Parameswaran plays the female lead

zack-snyder-justice-league.title: Zack Snyder Justice League
zack-snyder-justice-league.description: Determined to ensure Superman's ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne aligns forces with Diana Prince with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions.

vikram-vedha.title: Vikram Vedha
vikram-vedha.description: A tough police officer sets out to track down and kill an equally tough gangster.

gangubhai-khathiawadi.title: Gangubhai Kathiawadi
gangubhai-khathiawadi.description: A young woman, sold into prostitution by her suitor, takes control of the world she was forced into and becomes a matriarch.

animal.title: Animal
animal.description: A son undergoes a remarkable transformation as the bond with his father begins to fracture, and he becomes consumed by a quest for vengeance.

leo.title: Leo
leo.description: Parthiban is a mild-mannered cafe owner in Kashmir, who fends off a gang of murderous thugs and gains attention from a drug cartel claiming he was once a part of them.

karthikeya-2.title: Karthikeya 2
karthikeya-2.description: A sequel to the mystic thriller Karthikeya, which deals with the personal problems of Karthikeya and how his pursuit of the truth leads him to find out the power of the ancient Indian belief system and Tatva of Lord Sri Krishna.

guntur-karam.title: Guntur Karam
guntur-karam.description: Years after his mother leaves the family and remarries, a man seeks answers when approached by a politician asking him to sign legal documents denying his relation to her.

fast-x.title: Fast X
fast-x.description: Dom Toretto and his family are targeted by the vengeful son of drug kingpin Hernan Reyes.

rocky-aur-rani-kii-prem-kahani.title: Rocky Aur Rani Kii Prem Kahaani
rocky-aur-rani-kii-prem-kahani.description: Flamboyant Punjabi Rocky and intellectual Bengali journalist Rani fall in love despite their differences. After facing family opposition, they decide to live with each other's families for three months before getting married.

fighter.title: Fighter
fighter.description: Top aviators of the IAF come together in the face of imminent danger, to form Air Dragons. Fighter unfolds their camaraderie, brotherhood and battles, internal and external.

captain-miller.title: Captain Miller
captain-miller.description: A renegade Captain Miller and his unconventional outlaws execute a series of daring heists.

bhagavanth-kesari.title: Bhagavanth Kesari
bhagavanth-kesari.description: A man goes to great lengths to ensure his niece gets into the army, while confronting his past.

eagle.title: Eagle
eagle.description: A journalist uncovers the story of a ruthless assassin when she investigates a government cover up.

samajavaragamana.title: Samajavaragamana
samajavaragamana.description: A middle-class man struggles to pass his degree exams while dealing with family issues and a budding romance.

om-bheem-bush.title: Om Bheem Bush
om-bheem-bush.description: Three scientists inadvertently release a ghost in a village while searching for hidden treasure.

i-want-to-eat-your-pancreas.title: I Want to Eat Your Pancreas
i-want-to-eat-your-pancreas.description: "I Want to Eat Your Pancreas" is a Japanese animated film based on the novel of the same name by Yoru Sumino. The story follows an introverted high school boy who discovers the diary of his classmate, Sakura Yamauchi, and learns that she is suffering from a terminal pancreatic illness. Despite their contrasting personalities—Sakura being cheerful and outgoing, while the protagonist is reserved and indifferent—they form an unlikely friendship. As they spend more time together, they grow closer, and the protagonist learns to embrace life and human connections.

bheemla-nayak.title: Bheemla Nayak
bheemla-nayak.description: A strict police officer and a retired army havildar lock horns due to their egos.

vikram-hitlist.title: Vikram Hitlist
vikram-hitlist.description: A special investigator assigned a case of serial killings discovers the case is not what it seems to be and leading down this path is only going to end in a war between everyone involved.

the-marvels.title: The Marvels
the-marvels.description: Carol Danvers, aka Captain Marvel, has reclaimed her identity from the tyrannical Kree and taken revenge. But unintended consequences see Carol shouldering the burden of a destabilized universe.

oppenheimer.title: Oppenheimer
oppenheimer.description: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.

the-dark-knight.title: The Dark Knight
the-dark-knight.description: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice.

inception.title: Inception
inception.description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O., but his tragic past may doom the project and his team to disaster.

interstellar.title: Interstellar
interstellar.description: When Earth becomes uninhabitable in the future, a farmer and ex-NASA pilot, Joseph Cooper, is tasked to pilot a spacecraft, along with a team of researchers, to find a new planet for humans.

the-batman.title: The Batman
the-batman.description: When a sadistic serial killer begins murdering key political figures in Gotham, Batman is forced to investigate the city's hidden corruption and question his family's involvement.

john-wick-4.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
john-wick-4.description: John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances across the globe.

top-gun-maverick.title: Top Gun: Maverick
top-gun-maverick.description: After thirty years of service as a top naval aviator, Pete Maverick Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him.

barbie.title: Barbie
barbie.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

spider-man-across-the-spider-verse.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
spider-man-across-the-spider-verse.description: Miles Morales catapults across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. When the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles must redefine what it means to be a hero.

guardians-of-the-galaxy-vol-3.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3
guardians-of-the-galaxy-vol-3.description: Still reeling from the loss of Gamora, Peter Quill rallies his team to defend the universe and one of their own, a mission that could mean the end of the Guardians if not successful.

mission-impossible-dead-reckoning.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
mission-impossible-dead-reckoning.description: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team must track down a dangerous weapon before it falls into the wrong hands. With control of the future and the fate of the world at stake, a deadly race around the globe begins.

killers-of-the-flower-moon.title: Killers of the Flower Moon
killers-of-the-flower-moon.description: When oil is discovered in 1920s Oklahoma under Osage Nation land, the Osage people are murdered one by one — until the FBI steps in to unravel the mystery.

wonka.title: Wonka
wonka.description: Based on the extraordinary character at the center of Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, Wonka tells the wondrous story of how the world's greatest inventor became the beloved Willy Wonka we know today.

napoleon.title: Napoleon
napoleon.description: An epic that details the checkered rise and fall of French Emperor Napoleon Bonaparte and his relentless journey to power through the prism of his addictive, volatile relationship with his wife, Josephine.

poor-things.title: Poor Things
poor-things.description: The incredible tale of a young woman brought back to life by a brilliant but unorthodox scientist. Under his protection, she is eager to learn and experience everything about the world.

anyone-but-you.title: Anyone But You
anyone-but-you.description: After an amazing first date, Bea and Ben's fiery attraction turns ice-cold — until they unexpectedly find themselves at a destination wedding in Australia.

aquaman-and-the-lost-kingdom.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
aquaman-and-the-lost-kingdom.description: Black Manta seeks revenge on Aquaman for his father's death. With the power of the mythical Black Trident, he unleashes an ancient force. Aquaman must forge an uneasy alliance to save Atlantis.

dune-part-one.title: Dune
dune-part-one.description: A noble family becomes embroiled in a war for control over the galaxy's most valuable asset while its heir becomes troubled by visions of a dark future.

everything-everywhere-all-at-once.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
everything-everywhere-all-at-once.description: A middle-aged Chinese immigrant is swept up into an insane adventure in which she alone can save existence by exploring other universes and connecting with the lives she could have led.

joker.title: Joker
joker.description: During the 1980s, a failed stand-up comedian is driven insane and turns to a life of crime and chaos in Gotham City while becoming an infamous psychopathic criminal figure.

avatar-the-way-of-water.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
avatar-the-way-of-water.description: Jake Sully lives with his newfound family formed on the extrasolar moon Pandora. When a familiar threat returns to finish what was previously started, Jake must work with Neytiri and the army of the Na'vi race to protect their home.

pathaan.title: Pathaan
pathaan.description: An Indian spy takes on the leader of a group of mercenaries who have nefarious plans to target his homeland.

jawan.title: Jawan
jawan.description: A high-octane action thriller which outlines the emotional journey of a man who is set to rectify the wrongs in society.

stree-2.title: Stree 2
stree-2.description: The people of Chanderi are haunted once again when a new evil emerges, kidnapping women from their town. Vicky and his friends must once again battle the supernatural threat.
